title: Story between AAA wunder N Nautilus andEIFFEL TOWER IN EVA 3010
display_title: Story between AAA wunder N Nautilus andEIFFEL TOWER IN EVA 3010
wikitext:
[]: Story between AAA wunder / N-Nautilus and……EIFFEL TOWER IN EVA 3.0+1.0             Quote Post by ambiva » Sun Jun 30, 2019 6:10 pm Hi everyone Well I'm a long-long-long term GAINAX fans (since 1995) Being through Gunbuster - Nadia - EVA - and so on (I'm well familiar with similar elements inside them) Let me start with one thing, after ONE year of commission project by Plasmo, I've got this dream come true (if anyone is also a Nadia fan) https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=x_-FBfq0ho4 (diaroma videos coming next) Initially I was simply excited when someone remap EVA 3.33's music back to Nadia's scene. When I saw both 1:1000 kit of N-Nautilus and Eiffel tower, I knew something has to be done! (Nadia Episode 38) Music wise, Shirō Sagisu composed for both Nadia and EVA so in the 3.33 3.33 BGM: Gods Message（C17）Dark Defender（C16）The Anthem（C15） are remix epic version of "Light of Babel Tower" / "Resurrection" / "Universal Battleship N-Nautilus" in Nadia https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=uWhdlfSSZRM (a Live symphony) https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=lDunGtlNQVY (N-Nautilus launch using AAA-wunder's remix version) https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Q5WhB4Q098c If some of you don't know the hidden connection. Excelion (Gunbuster) -> N-Nautilus (Nadia, the original ship name is also Exelion) -> EVA01 (EVA, similar colour scheme) -> AAA wunder (EVA Q, Turrets layout, BGM, Colour) In addition Eltreum ( Gunbuster's 5th gen ship after Exelion ) is the original ship name of old-Nautilus Here's the Gainax ships (not to scale ) AAA Wunder 1916m Eltreum 70km Exelion 7205m N-Nautilus 333m ( original name Exelion, nick name Excavation ship ) Nautilus 152m ( original name Eltreum ) Fun fact: If you haven‘t know this, Hideaki Anno is a hardcore fan of Space Battleship Yamato N-Nautilus's launch pays complete homage to Yamato (like AAA wunder pays homage to N-Nautilus ) https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=zZ6wAbrxS2U (Comparing the animation sequence, identical turret sound effect, etc.) Yamato is also 333m long Don't know if I wanna buy the wunder model at that scale

[]: Re: Story between AAA wunder / N-Nautilus and Hideaki Anno's "secret"             Quote Post by ambiva » Sun Jun 30, 2019 6:14 pm Oh and this gonna be another diaroma once I got it planned

[]: Re: Story between AAA wunder / N-Nautilus and Hideaki Anno's "secret"             Quote Post by cyharding » Sun Jun 30, 2019 7:14 pm Regarding the Paris diorama, is there going to be a Red Noah to go along with it?

[]: Re: Story between AAA wunder / N-Nautilus and Hideaki Anno's "secret"             Quote Post by ambiva » Sun Jun 30, 2019 8:03 pm cyharding wrote: Regarding the Paris diorama, is there going to be a Red Noah to go along with it?

[]: Re: Story between AAA wunder / N-Nautilus and Hideaki Anno's "secret"             Quote Post by ambiva » Sat Jul 06, 2019 9:45 am Yes guess what Naughty Anno spoilers for 3+1  SPOILER: Show
